column2: NOT HPC — HPC down 2026-07-12). 60/60 arms ran in-container (59 compliant; 1 dense diag wall-killed). FIRE MAP + theta_max from the PRODUCTION arms; Theta_cum-over-window + dex_vs_EB from the DIAGNOSTIC (blowout) arms. For the DIFFUSE benches (bench3/2/1) the diag arm blows out cleanly (end R2 ~ rCloud) so theta_cum_prefire IS the L21b breakout-window Theta_cum; the DENSE benches (bench5/4) censor at shell-COLLAPSE (end R2 << rCloud) so their theta_cum is a collapse-window value
column3: NOT the clean L21b metric (fire map stands from production). dex_vs_EB = |dlog10(1-Theta_cum) - dlog10(1-theta_EB)|
